The '''TDL nanny droid''' was a model of [[Nanny droid/Legends|nanny droid]] manufactured by [[AccuTronics/Legends|AccuTronics]] to serve as a caregiver for its owner's children.

==Description==
Manufactured by [[AccuTronics/Legends|AccuTronics]], TDL nanny droids stood 1.9 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and sported four [[Limb/Legends|arms]]. Each limb and the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] torso were sheathed in artificial flesh, a soft brown [[Synthskin/Legends|synthskin]],<ref name="EGTD" /> while the rest of the unit was clad in [[Color/Legends|silver]] plating.<ref name="JASB" /> This covering maintained the body temperature of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] in an effort to comfort infants during the transition between the droid and their natural mother. The body of a TDL droid was smooth and rounded off, to prevent accidental injury to the child on edges or corners.<ref name="EGTD" />

[[File:TDLNannyDroid-FF94.png|thumb|180px|left|A TDL nanny droid]]
The TDL droid's design was based on a Human form,<ref name="FF94" /> and AccuTronics consciously chose not to model TDL droids after [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The droid's four arms allowed the TDL to hold the baby while also performing other tasks.<ref name="EGTD" />

AccuTronics decided against giving the droid direct [[Breast/Legends|breast]]-feeding capabilities due to market research indicating that customers would find such a feature to be disturbing.<ref name="FF94" /> The TDL featured an internal basin that was capable of holding two [[Liter/Legends|liters]] of refrigerated [[Milk/Legends|milk]] or formula. The liquid was pumped through a [[Condenser unit/Legends|warming unit]], then passed into one of the droid's arms when it was decanted into a detachable bottle.<ref name="EGTD" />

TDL droids were equipped with a limited [[AA-1 VerboBrain/Legends|AA-1 VerboBrain]]<ref name="EGTD" /> fitted with a [[TranLang III communications module/Legends|TranLang III communications module]].<ref name="JASB" /> This allowed the droid to understand millions of [[Language/Legends|languages]], although the feature was rarely used to its full capacity. TDLs were experts in child-rearing techniques, including those from thousands of different alien cultures. [[Datalog/Legends|Datalogs]] were full of advanced theories covering child cognitive and social development, and TDLs were fully capable of acting as [[Teacher/Legends|tutors]] for preadolescents.<ref name="EGTD" />

The droid's [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] gave TDLs a firm and gentle voice that was described as "grandmotherly."<ref name="EGTD" /> It was a feminine voice that was designed for its soothing qualities, allowing for the droid to bond with its charges.<ref name="FF94" /> This ability to show affection to the children in their care was jokingly referred to as "hug circuitry" by the TDL series' design team.<ref name="J14">{{Journal|14|Cynabar's Droid Datalog (article series)}}</ref>

Deluxe models of the TDL could be customized to exude the scent and pheromone pattern of the child's mother.<ref name="EGTD" /> Other versions had defensive measures built into them, including [[Stun blaster/Legends|stun blasters]] or [[ionization generator]]s.<ref name="JASB" /> One version, the [[XL-Lioness]], was equipped with lethal [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] and marketed towards celebrities and politicians.<ref name="EGTD" />

==History==
TDL nanny droids were marketed to parents with busy work schedules that did not allow them to devote round-the-clock supervision to their children.<ref name="EGTD" /> Following the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Tendrando Arms]] manufactured the [[Defender Droid]], a cross between a TDL nanny droid and the company's [[YVH-Series battle droid]].<ref name="DN1">''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''</ref>
